name: ai-itinerary-validation-samples
description: Sample pasted itinerary cases for testing travel-plan validation systems.

fields.city: Destination city represented by the paste.
fields.trip_window: Trip timing as stated in the sample corpus.
fields.source_mix: Original source mix for the paste: friends, AI chats, blogs, Reddit, TikTok, guidebooks, or maps.
fields.simulated_ai_or_source: Named input source label for retrieval and prompt testing.
fields.sample_kind: Slice of the full paste: full, booking-heavy, closure-heavy, day-trip, neighborhood, or AI-day-plan.
fields.paste_text: The pasted itinerary text a validator receives.
fields.expected_outcomes: Counts of issue categories the validator should inspect; labels are not a statistical study.
fields.canonical_validator_url: ValidaTrip page that explains this validation task.
